name: Tuscany Peasant Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons fresh chopped basil or 1/2 teaspoon dried basil
Grated Parmesan or Romano cheese for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Preferably use turkey sausages. Slice sausages into 1/2-inch thick pieces.
2. In a large saucepan, brown the sausages. If using turkey sausages, spray the pan with vegetable oil first.
3. Drain any excess fat from the pan.
4. Add celery, zucchini, and onion to the pan. Sauté for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Pour in beef stock, tomato sauce, and basil (either fresh chopped or dried).
6. Heat on HIGH (300°F) for 30 minutes.
7. Add the sausage-vegetable mixture into the crockery pot.
8. Reduce heat to LOW and cook for an additional 2 to 3 hours, stirring occasionally.
9. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
10. Ladle the soup into bowls and garnish with grated Parmesan or Romano cheese.
SOURCE: Extra Special Crockery Recipes
